story: story: Add new pipeline or workflow to the AIDLC VS Code extension

tasks.task: Define scope, user stories, and acceptance criteria for the Add Pipeline/Workflow CRUD feature
tasks.output: PRD written: 17 ACs (PIPE-AC01–AC17) covering create, edit, delete, toggle on_failure, human-step prefix, empty state, error states, and validation rules

tasks.task: Design the architecture for pipeline CRUD — addPipeline/editPipeline/deletePipeline in workspaceYamlReader, message handling in BuilderPanel, modal UI in WorkspaceApp.tsx
tasks.output: TECH-DESIGN.md produced — text-patch YAML strategy, 3 function contracts, BuilderPanel handler pseudocode, PipelineModal component design with validation, sequence diagram

tasks.task: Author acceptance scenarios for pipeline CRUD (create, edit, delete, toggle on_failure)
Implement pipeline CRUD — addPipeline/editPipeline/deletePipeline in workspaceYamlReader.ts, message handlers in BuilderPanel.ts, and the Create/Edit/Delete modal UI in WorkspaceApp.tsx
Validate implementation diff against PRD ACs; confirm CRUD operations work correctly
Run npm run compile and vsce package; verify no TypeScript errors
Package the extension as VSIX; record release artifact
Post-build static verification: VSIX exists, no regressions in compile output
Update CLAUDE.md pipeline CRUD section to reflect what was actually built
